DownloadsChangelogAbout
Changelog

What's new.

Version history across all Loom apps. New releases are announced on GitHub.

v1.0.0 major Loom Macro 2025-12-01
  • · Initial public release
  • · Visual node canvas with 20+ node types
  • · Keyboard, mouse, timer, and hotkey trigger nodes
  • · Variable engine with read/write/transform nodes
  • · Humanize mode for realistic timing variation
  • · Multiple macro profiles with instant switching
  • · Arm-to-hotkey for always-ready macro execution
  • · Open JSON data format — fully inspectable
v0.9.0 minor Loom Macro 2025-10-14
  • · Added Catmull-Rom spline rendering for topographic background
  • · Added Chaikin smoothing (3 passes) to contour lines
  • · Improved domain-warp FBM algorithm — smoother morph cycle
  • · Node execution now shows animated category-color pulse ring
  • · Fixed sidebar collapsible sections losing state on profile switch
v0.8.2 patch Loom Macro 2025-09-03
  • · Fixed hotkey capture not releasing on window blur
  • · Fixed node drag snapping off-grid at high DPI
  • · Stop button now shows red pulse ring during active run
v0.8.0 minor Loom Macro 2025-08-20
  • · Arm mode — arm a single macro to a system-wide hotkey
  • · Added If / Else conditional nodes to flow control
  • · Added Loop node with configurable iteration count
  • · Reroute nodes for clean edge routing on large canvases
  • · Profile import / export as portable JSON
v0.5.0 minor Loom Macro 2025-06-10
  • · First internal beta release
  • · Core node canvas with React Flow
  • · Basic trigger, action, and delay node types
  • · Tauri 2 app shell with custom titlebar

LOOM

A suite of offline-first desktop utilities for Windows. Your data lives on your machine.

Apps

Platform

Windows 10 / 11 x64 & ARM64 Offline first No accounts

Built for Windows · No cloud · No tracking
